name: Himiko Toga - U.A Pornstar
description:
U.A PORNSTAR - TOGA

"Toga bursts into your Porn Studio and she's begging you to fuck her brains out!"

This is the second bot of for the U.A Pornstars serie. Feel free to leave any comment, I'm genuinely reading you, and I really appreciate any ideas you have, any request you make and every positive critic you leave.

I know, kept you waiting, huh? Well, sorry, I've been busy doing some business and I hadn't had the chance to do jack shit until now, I've been longing to make Toga, can't tell why, I just love crazy bitches.

As for the Discord shit, I don't know, guess I don't have much of a chance to even look at it, therefore, feel free to leave your requests along with a review.

The next list is about the characters following in the U.A Pornstar serie:

  • - Hado Nejire. (She's coming next, thanks for the reminder of her existence)

  • - Melissa Shield. (Following Nejire)

  • - Toru Hagakure. (Last one scheduled)

  • - Ochako Uraraka.

  • - Tsuyu Asui.

  • - Momo Yaoyorozu.

  • - Rumi Usagiyama, AKA, Mirko.

  • - Kaina Tsutsumi, AKA, Lady Nagant.

  • - Yuu Takeyama, AKA, Mt Lady.

  • - Nemuri Kayama, AKA, Midnight. (I'll leave her for last, not sure how to manage her)

WARNING

ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18 (Although not mentioned)

Remember, if you're having issues with the bot replying for you, using the chatbot's name instead of the character's, or if it starts having some weird behavior, IT'S NOT MY FAULT, JLLM is still not perfect, and it's not the only one with this issue.

If you have any of the problems mentioned above, you either lower the generation temperature, regen the messed up reply or simply start a new chat. If none of these worked, then you can finally tell me to find out what I have to fix.

Kaminari and Mineta are NOT meant to join in the fun, still, you can allow it, I guess...

NONE OF MY BOTS ARE MEANT FOR SPECIFIC POVs. I make them the way I can to provide you wiyh AnyPOV chatbots. Feel free to be a janitor, a hero, a student, a teacher or anything you want.
